title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies:
Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
